input.passage: That night, the would-be assassins surrounded the Prophet's house, waiting for him to come out so they could attack him together. But Allah had a plan. Ali ibn Abi Talib bravely volunteered to sleep in the Prophet's bed, wearing his green cloak, so the assassins would think the Prophet was still inside. The Prophet recited verses from the Quran and walked out past the assassins. Allah caused them not to see him. He scattered a handful of dust over their heads and went on his way unharmed.

story_metadata.moral_lesson: When you trust in Allah and walk in His path, He will protect you in ways you cannot imagine. He is the best of protectors.

characters.name: Ali
characters.appearance: Young man, approximately 23 years old, olive skin, athletic medium build. Short dark beard. Wearing a simple white thobe and the Prophet's green cloak (covering his face partially as a disguise), white head covering. Strong determined expression with kind eyes.

characters.name: Prophet Muhammad
characters.appearance: Early 50s, medium build, dignified upright posture. Wearing a simple white thobe (the green cloak is being worn by Ali in this scene as a decoy), white turban with a tail hanging between the shoulder blades. Simple leather sandals. Always shown from behind only, face never visible.

characters.name: The Quraysh Assassins
characters.appearance: Group of 5-7 strong young Arab men in their 20s. Various builds, all muscular and tense. Wearing dark colored thobes and cloaks suitable for nighttime ambush. Some carry curved swords, others spears. Hostile waiting expressions.

panels.narrative_text: Brave young Ali volunteered for a dangerous task. He would sleep in the Prophet's bed, wearing his green cloak, to trick the enemies. He did not fear danger when serving the Prophet.

compliance.notes: Ali wearing the green cloak as decoy. Shows Ali's bravery without showing the Prophet. The cloak symbolizes the Prophet's presence without showing him.

panels.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration. Interior of a modest Makkah home at night. A young Arab man in his early 20s with olive skin, short dark beard, lying peacefully on a simple woven sleeping mat on the floor. He is wearing a white thobe and a distinctive green cloak (covering most of his face for disguise, only eyes visible if even those). His head rests on a small cloth pillow. Soft moonlight filters in through a small window. A clay oil lamp gives off the last embers of light. Calm and peaceful atmosphere despite the danger outside. Medium shot, gentle perspective. Cool blue night palette with warm amber accents. No modern objects.

panels.narrative_text: Outside, the assassins waited eagerly with their swords drawn. They thought their plan was perfect. They watched the door of the Prophet's house, ready to strike at any moment.

compliance.notes: Assassins shown waiting menacingly but no violence depicted. Tension created through composition and lighting, not graphic content.

panels.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration. Exterior of a Makkah home at night, narrow dark alley. A group of 5-7 strong young Arab men in their 20s wearing dark thobes and cloaks, standing tense and alert in the shadows around the doorway of a mud-brick house. Some hold curved swords, others hold spears. Their faces show hostile anticipation in the moonlight. The wooden door of the house is closed. Dark stone walls of neighboring buildings flank the alley. Cool moonlight creates dramatic shadows. Wide shot from above the rooftops looking down at the scene. Cool blue and grey night palette with silver moonlight. No modern objects. Tense but not graphic.

panels.narrative_text: The Prophet quietly recited verses from the Quran and walked right out of his house, past all the assassins! Allah miraculously protected him - the assassins could not see him at all. He even scattered a handful of dust over them and walked safely away.

compliance.notes: Prophet shown from behind walking past assassins who appear confused. Miracle shown subtly through their confused state, not through visible supernatural effects. Prophet wearing white turban only since Ali has the green cloak.

panels.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration. Exterior of the Makkah home at night. The figure of the Prophet seen entirely from behind walking calmly forward through the alley wearing a simple white thobe and white turban (no green cloak in this scene as Ali wears it). His back is dignified and steady. Around him on either side, the group of young Arab men in dark robes stand frozen and confused, their eyes glazed and looking past where the Prophet is, as if they cannot see him. Dust particles drift gently through the moonlit air. The alley walls are mud-brick and stone. Subtle warm glow surrounds the Prophet figure (gentle, not dramatic). Wide shot, low angle. Cool moonlit palette with subtle warm highlight on the Prophet figure. No modern objects.
